columns.name: ERP_ROWID
columns.description: System-generated unique row identifier

columns.name: ERP_TIME_INSERTED
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was inserted into the system

columns.name: ERP_STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed)

columns.name: ERP_AVDNR
columns.description: Reference number for the internal system

columns.name: ERP_ORDRENR
columns.description: Unique order reference number

columns.name: ORDERNUMBERCOMMERCE
columns.description: Order number as used in the commerce system

columns.name: CREATED
columns.description: Timestamp when the order was created

columns.name: SHIPPINGTOTAL
columns.description: Total shipping cost for the order

columns.name: TAXTOTAL
columns.description: Total tax amount for the order

columns.name: TOTAL
columns.description: Grand total of the order, including all costs and taxes

columns.name: SHIPPINGMETHODCODE
columns.description: Code representing the shipping method used

columns.name: PAYMENT_METHODE
columns.description: Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer)

columns.name: PAYMENT_STATUS
columns.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed)

columns.name: PAYMENT_TRANSACTIONID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

columns.name: PAYMENT_AMOUNT
columns.description: Amount of money paid or due for the order

columns.name: ISANONYMOUS
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is anonymous (1) or registered (0)

columns.name: CUSTOMERIDCOMMERCE
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer in the commerce system

columns.name: CUSTOMERIDERP
columns.description: Internal reference number for the customer

columns.name: LASTNAME
columns.description: Last name of the customer

columns.name: FIRSTNAME
columns.description: First name of the customer

columns.name: ADDRESS
columns.description: Physical address of the customer

columns.name: POSTALCODE
columns.description: Postal code of the customer's address

columns.name: PHONE
columns.description: Customer's phone number

columns.name: EMAIL
columns.description: Customer's email address

columns.name: ERP_TIME_PROCESSED
columns.description: Timestamp when the order was processed in the system

columns.name: PICKUPPOINTLOCATIONID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the pickup point location
